claim_ceiling: Functional Subject trial timeout/progress guard local workflow candidate pass
implementation_summary: Functional Subject trial writes functional_subject_trial_progress.json after each completed case.
Added --case-timeout-seconds to bound individual Functional Subject cases on Unix/WSL.
Timed-out cases produce explicit timeout metadata, skip GPT-5.5 judging, and remain unavailable/failure evidence rather than parent smoke pass evidence.

evidence_items.summary: Progress report and per-case timeout partial-report paths are covered.
One-case smoke wrote progress with completed_cases=1, timeout_case_count=0, and case_timeout_supported=true on WSL.

acceptance_result.evidence: timeout_count disables GPT-5.5 judge and keeps EGO-FS-010 blocked

residuals.summary: Rerun full 20-case Functional Subject real-provider trial with --case-timeout-seconds after provider access is stable, then attach GPT-5.5/human review.
